rule: Send only 5 best V2 outreach emails. Highest relevance, strongest custom angle, small site, clear useful offer, no backlink ask.

selected_prospects.target_page: Affordability guide (specific article TBD after site review)
selected_prospects.subject: Quick tool idea for your home affordability guide
selected_prospects.body_preview: I read your home buying affordability guide — the section walking through DTI calculations is exactly what buyers need. I built a free mortgage affordability calculator that lets readers plug in their own numbers instead of just reading a static example. No signup, no data collection. Would this be useful for your readers?
selected_prospects.personalization: Reference specific DTI section from their guide

selected_prospects.subject: Quick tool idea for your debt payoff guide

selected_prospects.subject: Quick tool idea for your repayment guide
selected_prospects.body_preview: I read your student loan repayment comparison — the numbers are helpful but static. I have a free debt payoff calculator where readers enter their actual loan balances and rates and see exactly which payoff method saves more. No signup, no data collection. Would this be useful alongside your repayment content?

selected_prospects.subject: Idea for your dividend growth article
selected_prospects.body_preview: Your dividend investing article walks through compound growth examples — really clear. I can create an interactive version where your readers enter their own portfolio size and dividend yield and see their personal growth projection. Same math, but personalized. No signup, completely free. Would that be useful for the article?
selected_prospects.personalization: Custom interactive version of their dividend growth calculation
